rationale: Educ. Code §21.213 governs nonapplicability of hearing examiner subchapter to probationary and continuing contract teachers. It bears no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Except as provided by Section 21.202, this subchapter does not apply to a teacher employed under a probationary contract in accordance with Subchapter C or a continuing contract in accordance with Subchapter D.
_note: No conflict. The cited education code provision addresses teacher contract hearing procedures and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
